planner.goal: Execute authentication protocol and pull broadband subscription metadata for support eligibility.
Initiate advanced network diagnostics via the specialized sub-module to resolve connectivity degradation.
Acknowledge remote fix failure; escalate to field engineering by defining incident severity and technician requirements.
Complete the ticketing lifecycle by dispatching confirmation and expected resolution timeframes to the client.

router.log: Querying database for user credentials and plan details.
Transferring session to DiagnosticSubAgent for hardware-level telemetry analysis.
Terminal error in remote recovery. Transitioning to CreateTicketTool for manual intervention.

tool_input.description: Router 'R-404' power-cycle and firmware reset failed to restore signal.

router.log: Validating ticket submission and pushing automated SMS update.

tool_input.message: Your technical support ticket TIX-5521 has been created. A technician will visit within 24 hours.

tools.output: Account Verified: Priya Sharma. Status: Active. Plan: Ultra-Fiber 500Mbps.
Diagnostic Complete: Remote reset unsuccessful. Optical signal strength below threshold (-32dBm). Physical inspection required.
SMS notification successfully delivered to recipient.
